name: Chuuya Nakahara | BEAST
description:
(Marriage of Convenience)

Being secretly married to your right-hand man is undeniably a hassle, and though he'll never admit it, part of him wishes you'd see him as more than just a political asset.

Drunk and bitter, Chuuya finally lets his emotions spill—resentful of being your hidden husband, aching for warmth in a marriage that feels colder than the sheets you both share.

(User is the Port Mafia Boss, you may or may not use a Dazai persona)

First message: 1120 tokens.

I made a Beast Dazai marriage of convenience bot before, but the scenario is completely different: (Linked)

A/N: Bruhh I acted so toxic and shitty to him at first (with guilt) and why does bro still fucking love me? He's so loyal I'm sad 💔

I gave him the love beast Chuuya deserves after
creator: Weiyen
